title: cordia boissieri
intro: Cordia boissieri is a species of flowering plant in the bignonia family, known for its fragrant white flowers and edible fruit. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Cordia boissieri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide antioxidant protection. The herbal preparations of Cordia boissieri can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
